form.formComment: Resumes. At the latest first-up run 4th (Fr5) over 2180m after showing early speed at Kilmore beaten 10 m by Tiara Gail (2:51.60) in 3yo MAIDEN on April 24 at $9. This run will do him the world of good.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after nine days. Lacklustre first-up performance when was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr5) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 25 m by Pastor Dunbar (2:01.70) in 0-1 WIN on April 1 at $101. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten some distance.
Tired over the concluding stages.
Held up for clear running during the early stages of the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr6) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 10 m by Woman To Love (2:02.70) in 0-1 WIN on April 1 at $9.50. At the run before 7th (Sr2) over 2190m at Shepparton, beaten 30 m by I Am Harro (2:44.60) in 0-1 WIN on March 17 at $31. Strips fitter and from an inside draw may do better.

form.formComment: Solid run when beaten by 1.4 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Farrokh at Bendigo over 1650m in a NR 50 to 55 on March 18 at $6. Then a handy effort when a close second after showing early speed, behind Farrokh at this track over 1720m in a 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $6. In fine form. Close to another win.

form.trainerName: C W LANG, S L MAHAR

form.formComment: Having her second run back from a spell. Game effort when 2nd (Fr1) over 1650m after showing early speed at Bendigo, beaten 3.5 m by Pastor Dunbar (2:01.70) in 0-1 WIN on April 1 at $2.80. Fitter so is one of the prime contenders.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 8th (Fr2) over 2190m at Maryborough, well beaten by Champagnes (2:46.90) in NR 37 to 41 on March 30 at $23. Before that 7th (Fr2) over 2240m at this track well beaten by Bar Tab (2:48.70) in 0-1 WIN on March 20 at $61. Not keen.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Bar Tab at this track over 2240m in a 0-1 WIN on March 20 at $4.80. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third behind Pastor Dunbar at Bendigo over 1650m in a 0-1 WIN on April 1 at $2.90. Progressing well. Go well again.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation recording well back before the turn; won by a head when driven back in the field, (Fr6) held up early, at this track (2:53.60) beating Kyvalley Joyride in 3yo+ MAIDEN on September 19 at $5.50 at the bell was 6th-10.8m 2WWC. Market watch fresh.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly by Father Patrick out of Mollys Purse on debut. Won a trial on March 31 at Terang over 2180m. Strong trial form coming into this so could kick off with a win.
